title: PolylineData
description: PolylineData: Data corresponding to polylinear data and style properties.

EdgeColour.description: Colour of the edge of the path. No colour change will be made if left empty.

FillColour.description: Fill colour for the shape. If left empty, no fill will be applied.

FillOpacity.description: Opacity of the fill where 1 means full opacity and 0 means full transperency.

IsDashed.description: Toggles if the line should be dashed or not.

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
